not_changed_reason: Outcome-unavailable / idempotency hardening was implemented entirely in run_paper_evaluation_job (scheduler). The evaluator metric math is already a pure function of (paper rows, outcome corpus) and required no change, so it was left untouched to keep the diff minimal.
sequence_note: run_daily_mlb_scheduler now exposes all four jobs in payload['jobs'] and a payload['scheduler_sequence'] list. The two paper steps default OFF (status NOT_RUN) and do not affect the scheduler gate or manifest, which remain derived from pregame + postgame only. Existing pregame/postgame behavior is preserved.

paper_recommendation_job_contract.wired_into: run_daily_mlb_scheduler (step 1b, between pregame and paper evaluation)
paper_recommendation_job_contract.default_off_reason: The recommendation job performs live TSL + MLB schedule probes (_pick_game / _probe_tsl). It defaults OFF so that run_daily_mlb_scheduler() with default args (existing tests, the scripts/run_mlb_daily_scheduler.py CLI, any naive caller) never triggers a live fetch. The daily daemon enables it explicitly via run_paper_recommendation=True for live paper generation.
paper_recommendation_job_contract.not_run_status: NOT_RUN with details.reason explaining the opt-in

paper_evaluation_job_contract.wired_into: run_daily_mlb_scheduler (step 1c, after paper recommendation, before postgame)
paper_evaluation_job_contract.execution: fully offline — reads local PAPER rows + local outcome corpus, no network, no DB
paper_evaluation_job_contract.new_param: write_output (default True); the orchestrator passes write_output=write_reports so the dry-run/no-write path writes nothing

outcome_unavailable_contract.summary: The normal pregame case is 'paper rows exist but their outcomes have not happened yet'. This is now classified as DATA_LIMITED (was previously SUCCESS), so the daily chain never implies a meaningful evaluation before outcomes arrive.

data_status_tokens.NO_PAPER_ROWS: evaluated_count == 0 -> DATA_LIMITED (no recommendations for the date)
data_status_tokens.OUTCOMES_UNAVAILABLE: evaluated_count > 0 and matched_outcome_count == 0 -> DATA_LIMITED (rows present, outcomes not yet available)

outcome_unavailable_contract.small_sample_warning: When 0 < matched_outcome_count < 30 (PAPER_EVAL_SMALL_SAMPLE_THRESHOLD), a small-sample warning is emitted; metrics are not statistically significant.
outcome_unavailable_contract.no_crash_guarantee: All branches return a DailyJobResult; exceptions are caught and reported as FAILED with details.data_status = EXCEPTION.

idempotency_contract.summary: Evaluation metrics are a pure function of (paper rows, outcome corpus). Re-running the same date before outcomes arrive is deterministic / idempotent; once outcomes land, the same output path is overwritten with updated metrics.
idempotency_contract.before_outcomes: Re-run -> identical metrics + identical DailyJobResult.details (timestamp_utc in the artifact may differ; the metrics block does not).
idempotency_contract.after_outcomes: Re-run with outcomes present -> SUCCESS, matched_outcome_count > 0, same output_path overwritten deterministically.

observed_run_2026_05_11.note: Run with write_output=False to avoid writing the out-of-whitelist p143_paper_eval artifact. Sample size = 2; not statistically significant.

paper_only_guardrails.default_no_live_fetch: run_daily_mlb_scheduler() with default args runs no paper step and triggers no live fetch (proven by test_38).

remaining_blockers.impact: Paper rows written with stake=0; evaluator handles via shadow_unit_roi.
remaining_blockers.resolution: Awaiting TSL access or alternative source.

remaining_blockers.impact: Stake blocked; paper audit trail still written.
remaining_blockers.resolution: Requires model improvement for positive BSS.

remaining_blockers.description: True P0: no legal authorized pregame odds for live execution
remaining_blockers.impact: Paper-only tracking continues; no EV/CLV/Kelly unlock.

remaining_blockers.description: Background daemon regenerates runtime/data/log noise files (training_memory.json, tsl_*.json, odds_*, daemon_heartbeat.jsonl)
remaining_blockers.impact: Persistent git dirty state; tolerated for this task, not staged/committed.
remaining_blockers.resolution: Dedicated .gitignore / runtime-isolation hygiene task (deferred by user 2026-06-03; now blocks every task preflight).

remaining_blockers.description: Paper corpus is tiny (2 rows / 1 date). Daily accumulation requires the daemon to enable run_paper_recommendation=True + run_paper_evaluation=True.
remaining_blockers.impact: The wiring exists; corpus growth depends on the daemon opting in to the (live-probe) recommendation step.
remaining_blockers.resolution: Daemon/operator enables paper steps in the daily run; a future task may add a daemon-side enablement + scheduling decision.
